message: Trays from yesterday still look decent. Let's nail the cornmeal ratio before we waste more product.
Yeah, the ratio's the thing - what if we bumped it just slightly and tested both versions side by side today?
Cornmeal carries the whole nostalgia weight - if we're shifting the ratio, the copy needs to track what that actually changes in the bite, not just nod at the test.
Copy tracking the ratio change - that's actually smart. Fine. Test both at 30/70 and 35/65 cornmeal to flour, same technique, same heat.
Marcus nailed it - we'll know exactly what the ratio shift does to the actual eating experience once we taste them back to back.
Both batches get tested this afternoon. You'll taste the difference before lunch tomorrow. That's the work.
